buyers.thesis: Paychex completed $4.1B acquisition of Paycor in April 2025 and now serves 790,000 customers. HR.com's media, events and certification platform gives Paychex a content and lead-generation engine for their 790K customer base. Strategic content moat.

Workday made 3 acquisitions in 2025 (Paradox, Sana, FlowiseAI) expanding from system of record to system of action. HR.com's community of 2M+ HR professionals provides audience, content, and lead-gen that complements Workday's enterprise HCM suite.

SAP acquired SmartRecruiters in August 2025 to strengthen HCM suite. HR.com's HR certification, community, and media platform would give SAP a content marketing engine and direct line to HR decision-makers globally.
Took Dayforce private for $12.3B in 2025 — largest HR tech PE deal of the year. HR.com's media platform could serve as content/community bolt-on to any of Thoma Bravo's HR tech portfolio companies.

ADP serves 1M+ clients globally. HR.com's HR professional community and certification programs create a powerful lead-gen and thought-leadership channel that strengthens ADP's brand authority with HR buyers.

Deel was highlighted as one of the top HR M&A movers in 2025. Growing rapidly in global HR/payroll. HR.com's content platform and 2M+ HR professional audience would accelerate Deel's brand awareness and enterprise sales.

HR tech research and advisory firm tracking 650+ HR tech transactions in 2025. HR.com would combine research, media, and events into a comprehensive HR intelligence platform. Strategic content consolidation play.
buyers.source: Exa - Lighthouse Research HR Tech M&A recap

buyers.thesis: Recorded 650+ HR tech transactions globally through Q3 2025 with $22.3B in disclosed capital. Premier HR tech M&A advisor who could introduce HR.com to their active PE/strategic buyer network.
buyers.source: Exa - Drake Star HR Tech transaction data 2025

buyers.thesis: Global HR services giant with $25B+ revenue. HR.com's media platform and HR certification programs would give Randstad a direct channel to HR buyers across industries, strengthening their talent solutions positioning.

Invested $5.9B secondary stake in P&I (HR software) in 2025. Active PE investor in HR technology. HR.com's media and community platform would be a strategic content layer on top of any HG HR tech portfolio company.
